text: The Center shall provide the network identifier for each roadway network it maintains.
The Center shall provide the network name for each roadway network it maintains.
The Center shall provide the number of links in the network for each roadway network it maintains.
The Center shall provide the number of nodes in the network for each roadway network it maintains.
The Center shall provide the list of link data for each roadway network it maintains.
The Center shall provide the list of node data for each roadway network it maintains.
The Center shall provide the link identifier for each link.
The Center shall provide the link name for each link.
The Center shall provide the road number for each link.
The Center shall provide the link type for each link.
The Center shall provide the link type description for each link.
The Center shall provide the start node for each link.
The Center shall provide the end node for each link.
The Center shall provide the direction for each link.
The Center shall provide the length for each link.
The Center shall provide the capacity for each link.
The Center shall provide the speed limit for each link.
The Center shall provide the speed limit truck for each link.
The Center shall provide the number of lanes for each link.
The Center shall provide the node identifier for each node.
The Center shall provide the node name for each node.
The Center shall provide the node jurisdiction for each node.
The Center shall provide the owner for each node.
The Center shall provide the latitude and longitude for each node.
The Center shall provide the type of node (e.g., intersection or bridge) for each node.
The Center shall provide the node type description for each node.
The Center shall provide the number of links for each node.
The Center shall provide traffic condition delay for each link defined within the Center.
The Center shall provide traffic condition travel time for each link defined within the Center.
The Center shall provide traffic condition volume for each link defined within the Center.
The Center shall provide traffic condition speed for each link defined within the Center.
The Center shall provide traffic condition density for each link defined within the Center.
The Center shall provide traffic condition occupancy for each link defined within the Center.
The Center shall support the incident description for each incident.
The Center shall support the roadway information for each incident.
The Center shall support the cross street information for each incident.
The Center shall support the latitude and longitude for each incident.
The Center shall support the status for each incident.
The Center shall support the affected lanes for each incident.
The Center shall support the incident type and incident type description for each incident.
The Center shall support the confirmed date and time for each incident.
The Center shall support the cleared date and time for each incident.
The Center shall support the starting roadway for each lane closure.
The Center shall support the latitude and longitude of the starting location for each lane closure.
The Center shall support the ending roadway for each lane closure.
The Center shall support the latitude and longitude of the ending location for each lane closure.
The Center shall support the days closed for each lane closure.
The Center shall support the start time of day and end time of day for each lane closure.
The Center shall provide sign geometry (row/column) status information about each DMS.
The Center shall provide the current message (MULTI string) status information about each DMS.
The Center shall support the immediate message (MULTI string) device control command for a DMS.
The Center shall support the signal pattern device control command for a Lane Control Signal (LCS).
The Center shall provide the current pan/tilt/zoom/focus/iris status information for each CCTV.
The Center shall support a CCTV lock camera control request.
The Center shall support a CCTV set absolute (pan/tilt/zoom/focus/iris) control request.
The Center shall support a video snapshot in JPEG format for each CCTV.
The Center shall support a video channel input and output identifier switching command.
The Center shall support the plan and duration device control command for a ramp meter.
The Center shall support the message and message text device control command for a Highway Advisory Radio (HAR).
The Center shall support the traffic signal plan identifier device control command for a Traffic Signal.
The Center shall support the reading and units status information for each Environmental Sensor Station (ESS).
The Center shall support the occupants status information for each High Occupancy Vehicle (HOV) lane.
The Center shall support the capacity and utilization status information for each Parking Lot.
The Center shall support the estimated time for a train to clear an intersection for each Railroad Crossing.
The Center shall support the indicator status and direction status information for each Reversible Lane.
The Center shall support the schedule adherence status information for each Bus Location.
The Center shall support the priority request status information for each Vehicle Priority.
The Data Collector shall be designed to support the storage of TMDD data elements and message set information.
The C2C Project shall utilize the TMDD standard to transmit information.
DATEX/ASN shall be used to transmit the TMDD message sets.
TCP/IP shall be used to transmit the DATEX/ASN data.
The web map shall display interstates and state highways on the graphical map.
The map user shall be able to alter the current magnification (zoom level) of the map.
The map user shall be able to pan the map in North South East or West directions.
The map shall display the current incidents as icons.
The Incident GUI shall allow the user to enter incident or lane closure information without the use of a Center.
The Incident GUI shall allow the user to input detection time and response time for each incident.
The remote Center Control GUI shall be designed to execute on a public network.
The C2C Server shall execute in a Microsoft Windows NT environment.
The C2C shall be implemented in the C/C++ programming language.
The C2C shall be able to operate in normal mode and test mode.
